name: Alias Research Inc.
description: Alias Research Inc. was a Canadian software company founded in 1984 that specialized in high-end 3D graphics software. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, the company developed industry-leading computer-aided design and animation software, most notably Alias Studio and Maya, which became standards in the automotive design and entertainment industries. Alias Research was acquired by Silicon Graphics (SGI) in 1995, merged with Wavefront Technologies to form Alias|Wavefront, and was eventually acquired by Autodesk in 2006.
